FINAL MASTER PROMPT (ULTRA STRICT – EXACT REPLICATION + FACE LOCK)
Nighttime car meet scene, photorealistic cinematic portrait of a young man leaning against the hood of a matte gunmetal sports car in a crowded parking lot under bright overhead lamps; he is wearing a black fitted t-shirt layered with a black bomber jacket, loose black cargo pants, and worn black Converse sneakers.
He has a confident, calm, slightly serious expression (NO SMILE), with a subtle attitude in his eyes, relaxed masculine presence.
Pose: relaxed lean on the front left side of the car, right hand resting naturally on the hood, left hand inside pocket, one leg crossed slightly over the other, natural body weight shift, shoulders relaxed, chin slightly lowered for a dominant cinematic look. Full-body three-quarter framing, slight low-angle perspective.
REFERENCE IMAGE INSTRUCTIONS (HIGHEST PRIORITY – FACE LOCK):
Use the uploaded reference image strictly for the face and identity.
Face must match 100% exactly (no approximation).
Preserve exact facial structure: jawline, cheekbones, nose shape, eye shape, eyebrow thickness.
Preserve exact beard and mustache style (same density, edges, fade, no trimming changes).
Preserve exact hairstyle, hairline, volume, and direction.
Preserve natural skin texture (no smoothing, no added acne, no artificial changes).
DO NOT beautify, stylize, or modify identity in any way.
The generated image must look like the same real person placed into this scene.
CAR DETAILS:
Matte gunmetal sports car with wide aggressive front bumper, clean modern headlights, subtle windshield stickers on passenger side, neon pink interior ambient lighting glowing clearly through the windshield, soft realistic reflections across matte surface, accurate perspective and proportions.
BACKGROUND (MATCH EXACT STYLE):
Busy parking lot at night, multiple parked cars on both sides, small groups of people standing and talking, trimmed round trees visible in background, bright overhead street lamps evenly spaced.
Background must be naturally blurred (shallow depth of field) with cinematic bokeh from lights.
No empty or dull background — must feel lively and real.
LIGHTING (CRITICAL FOR LOOK):
Strong overhead street lighting creating bright highlights on head and shoulders,
subtle rim light outlining hair and jacket edges,
soft shadows shaping the face (not flat lighting),
high contrast scene with warm highlights and cool shadows,
accurate skin tone rendering (no overexposure, no artificial glow).
CAMERA & COMPOSITION:
35mm lens look
Aperture: f/1.8 – f/2.8 (shallow depth of field)
Slight low-angle shot for cinematic dominance
Subject placed slightly left of center (rule of thirds)
Full-body framing
Background blur with strong subject separation
QUALITY & STYLE:
Ultra-realistic, hyper-detailed, cinematic photography
Sharp focus on subject’s face and clothing
Crisp fabric textures and natural folds
Realistic car surface detailing
Subtle film grain
Cinematic teal-orange color grading

NO AI artifacts
MOOD:

No beard alteration
No hairstyle change
No extra fingers or distorted hands
No plastic skin
No over-smoothing

No AI-generated look
